Short-Term Storage • NYC & Westchester

Storage during your move, handled like one clean operation.

Short-term storage in NYC and Westchester for moving gaps, closing delays, renovations, staging, and temporary transitions. Atlantic Star Relocations coordinates pickup, protection, secure storage, and final delivery — without making you manage separate companies.

Short-term storage services built around real moving problems.

Most storage issues are timing issues. A lease ends before move-in, a closing gets delayed, renovation work runs longer, or building access creates a narrow window. This page is built for those exact situations.

Our moving and storage services connect transportation, short-term storage, protection, and final delivery into one structured system.

  • Short-term storage in NYC and Westchester County
  • Temporary storage during your move
  • Storage between locations, closings, or leases
  • Furniture storage with professional handling
Organized storage support Items prepared, protected, and staged before temporary storage or final delivery.

When you need storage, speed matters — but control matters more.

Roadway-style conversion is about answering the customer’s real question fast: “Can you handle this without chaos?”

Move gaps

Between move dates

Your move-out and move-in dates do not line up. We pick up, store, and deliver when the next location is ready.

Delays

Closing or lease delays

If timing changes, your belongings still have a controlled destination instead of becoming a last-minute problem.

Projects

Renovation storage

Furniture and boxes stay away from dust, paint, flooring, workers, and construction activity.

Real estate

Staging & decluttering

Clear space before photos, showings, open houses, or listing preparation.

Buildings

Apartment logistics

Useful when elevators, access windows, parking, or building rules make the move more complicated.

Business

Office transitions

Temporary holding for desks, chairs, supplies, files, equipment, and office furniture.

One plan from pickup to final delivery.

Storage works best when the moving crew, packing plan, inventory, building access, storage timing, and delivery schedule are connected from the beginning.

1

Plan

We review inventory, dates, access, stairs, elevators, packing needs, and delivery timing.

2

Prepare

Furniture can be wrapped, boxes labeled, fragile items identified, and access planned.

3

Store

Items are moved into short-term storage with clear retrieval and delivery expectations.

4

Deliver

When your new space is ready, we schedule final delivery and placement.

Have a storage gap? Send the details before the timing gets messy.

Best first step: pickup address, delivery address or TBD, estimated boxes/furniture, storage dates, stairs/elevator, and packing needs.

Moving and storage services in NYC & Westchester

We provide short-term storage services across NYC and Westchester County, including White Plains, Yonkers, New Rochelle, Scarsdale, Larchmont, Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, New Jersey, and Connecticut.

Short-Term Storage FAQ

Questions people ask before booking temporary storage during a move, renovation, staging project, or delayed move-in.

Do you offer short-term storage in NYC?

Yes. We provide short-term storage support for NYC moves, including pickup, storage coordination, protection, and final delivery.

Do you offer storage in Westchester County?

Yes. We support storage-related moves in White Plains, Yonkers, New Rochelle, Scarsdale, Larchmont, and nearby Westchester areas.

Can I use storage during my move?

Yes. Short-term storage is ideal when you need temporary storage between move-out and move-in dates.

Do movers provide storage?

Yes. Atlantic Star Relocations connects moving and storage services so you do not need to coordinate separate providers.

Can you pack before storage?

Yes. Packing, wrapping, labeling, and furniture protection can be included before items go into storage.

Is this useful for renovations?

Yes. Short-term storage keeps furniture and belongings away from dust, paint, flooring work, contractors, and construction activity.

How long can items stay in storage?

It depends on your timeline. Many clients use it for a few days, several weeks, or until their new space is ready.

How do I get a quote?

Send your pickup address, delivery location, item list, storage timing, packing needs, and building access details.

Request a short-term storage quote.

Tell us what needs to be stored, where it is now, how long you need storage, and where it should be delivered later.

Call: (929) 249-2727
Email: hello@atlanticstargroup.com

For faster pricing, include photos, inventory, elevator/stairs, parking/building rules, and preferred dates.
